title: Melee decomp resource library index
description: Single top-level entry point and search playbook for the vertically sliced decomp resource library.
useful_for: Starting point for agents and contributors before searching data sheets, PDFs, external mirrors, PR records, or repo metadata.

title: Melee decomp resource notes
description: Cleaned-up archive of the original resource scratchpad with trust notes and context order.
useful_for: Human orientation and caution rules for external resource use.

title: Resource manifest
description: Machine-readable top-level manifest for local resources and generated search artifacts.
useful_for: Ingestion into a local data store or search database.

title: Resource acquisition queue
description: Machine-readable status queue for mirrored and candidate external resources.
useful_for: Tracking what has been pulled, where it lives locally, how to refresh it, and what caution applies.

title: SSBM Data Sheet 1.02
description: Community workbook of Melee 1.02 addresses, IDs, offsets, structs, attributes, subaction events, and memory ranges.
useful_for: Memory layout lookup, field naming, ID lookup, debugger watches, struct reconstruction, and data-backed decomp notes.

title: SSBM data sheet CSV exporter
description: Refresh script that exports the workbook into per-sheet CSVs, sheet_index.csv, and normalized cells.csv.
useful_for: Rebuilding the local searchable data sheet store when the workbook changes.

title: SSBM data sheet sheet index
description: Generated index describing each workbook sheet, used ranges, row counts, cell counts, formulas, links, comments, and intended use.
useful_for: Finding the right per-sheet CSV or deciding where a lookup belongs.

title: SSBM data sheet normalized cell index
description: Generated one-row-per-cell search table with sheet name, row/column/cell address, value, formula, hyperlink, comment, row label, nearest-above context, and row text.
useful_for: Global text search across all workbook content and ingestion into a local search database.

title: SSBM data sheet per-sheet CSVs
description: Generated wide CSVs preserving source row numbers and spreadsheet column letters for each workbook sheet.
useful_for: Sheet-specific context after finding a hit in cells.csv.

title: PowerPC PDF page indexer
description: Refresh script that extracts page-level text from local PowerPC PDFs with pdftotext.
useful_for: Rebuilding the searchable PowerPC document index.

title: PowerPC PDF page index
description: Generated page-level text index for the PowerPC EABI, Compiler Writer's Guide, and ISA PDFs.
useful_for: Searchable ABI, stack/register, instruction, condition-register, branch, conversion, and compiler-pattern lookup.

title: PowerPC Embedded Application Binary Interface
description: PowerPC EABI 32-bit implementation reference.
useful_for: ABI rules, register roles, stack frames, calling conventions, relocation/linkage expectations, and function boundary reasoning.

title: The PowerPC Compiler Writer's Guide
description: IBM compiler writer guide for PowerPC code generation.
useful_for: Recognizing compiler-emitted assembly patterns, control flow, conversions, calling patterns, and optimizer/codegen idioms.

title: PowerPC User Instruction Set Architecture Book I
description: Instruction semantics, condition register behavior, branch forms, loads/stores, integer operations, and floating-point operations.

title: External resource index builder
description: Refresh script for Training Mode MAP, Tockdom compiler page, m-ex header indexes, and ppc2cpp source index.
useful_for: Rebuilding searchable indexes after replacing mirrored external resources.

description: Mirrored Dolphin MAP file from UnclePunch Training Mode.

title: Training Mode GTME01 map symbol index
description: Generated index of section, address, size, virtual address, flags, name, and placeholder status from GTME01.map.

title: Tockdom compiler page HTML
description: Mirrored Tockdom Compiler wiki page HTML.

title: Tockdom compiler page text

title: Tockdom compiler page index
